short_summary: Iran deal energy relief, EU accession
rationale: Romania benefits from the same energy price relief signals as other EU members; EU accession progress for Ukraine and Moldova directly affects Romania's immediate neighborhood and long-term regional stability.

top_events.title: EU formally launches accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: Moldova — Romania's closest neighbor and cultural kin — formally enters EU accession process, a major positive step for regional stability and Romania's geopolitical environment.

top_events.title: Iran signals Hormuz reopening if peace deal signed
top_events.summary: A potential US-Iran deal could ease energy prices across the EU, offering indirect relief to Romanian households still dealing with elevated energy costs.

top_events.title: UAE to unlock frozen Iranian funds amid US ceasefire push
top_events.summary: Momentum toward a US-Iran deal grows; if successful, lower oil prices would benefit Romania's import-dependent economy.
